bakery style oreo stuffed cookies 🍪🥛    recipe: ingredients: ¾ cup salted butter, softened (170 g) ¾ cup packed brown sugar (150 g) ¼ cup granulated sugar (50 g) 1 large egg  1 tsp vanilla (5 g) 2 cups all-purpose flour (240 g) 1 tbsp cornstarch (8 g) ½ tsp baking soda (3 g) ¼ tsp salt (1.5 g) oreos, some whole some  roughly chopped  white chocolate (measure with your heart)  & choceur cookie and cream chocolate’s   instructions: cream the butter and sugars together  until smooth and slightly fluffy. mix in the egg and vanilla until fully combined. in a separate bowl, whisk together the flour, cornstarch, baking soda, and salt. fold the dry ingredients into the wet just until combined.  chop some of the oreos into small chunks ( leave some for topping ) and fold them in along with the white chocolate. scoop the dough into 8 portions, flatten and add an oreo inside and chocolate then shape into tall mounds. ( i flatten the top but keep them tall ) bake at 375°F for 11–14 minutes, until the edges are set and the centers are still soft. ( baking time may vary ) let cool to set the cookies!  i added moser roths white chocolate to the bottom & inside !    #oreo #cookies #chocolatechipcookies #Recipe #baking
Probably not her favorite faces but I wish she knew how much we love her and care about her 😂🥹😭💕 The beloved sad girl came back in for a vet visit today.  #vet #veterinarian #doglover #vetmed

We once discussed veterinary medicine from the perspective of how humans came to the idea of helping other living creatures while spending their own time and resources on it. Strictly speaking, this mostly applies to pets, because in the industrial world veterinarians often work with farm animals. Today I want you to think about how incredibly complex this science really is. A veterinarian has to understand the anatomy and physiology of dozens of different species in order to help them. From a tiny aquarium fish to a massive python, any creature may need care, and it is honestly impressive how veterinarians manage to keep all of this knowledge in their minds while making decisions that can determine the fate of their patients. Veterinarians save tens of thousands of beloved pets and prevent epidemics among farm animals, which in many ways also means protecting human populations. Thank you, veterinarians. #Veterinarian #Medicine #Animals #edit #Pets

RASPBERRY TIRAMISU 💕✨ Welcome to Episode 17 of my tiramisu series! This Raspberry Tiramisu aka Raspberrymisu is long overdue, and my most requested flavor! It has definitely earned a spot up there. From the vibrant pink and sweet and sour flavors from the berries it’s hard not to love this dessert. It has a layer of raspberry mascarpone cream, raspberry dipped ladyfingers and a raspberry sauce topping. It’s a raspberry dream 😍 Add it to your summer dessert list ASAP. Ingredients  - 3/4 cup of homemade raspberry juice  - 1 ½ cups of heavy cream or double cream - 16 oz or 450g of mascarpone cheese - ¾ cup of granulated sugar - 1 teaspoons of vanilla extract - 260 g of Ladyfingers or enough to fill the dish Topping - Homemade raspberry sauce  - Fresh raspberries for topping  - Mint leaves for garnish  #raspberrytiramisu #raspberrydessert #uniquedesserts #tiramisunoegg  #adesserttomakeanydayspecial

Strawberry Nutella Brownies 🍫💌🍓 So fudgy & perfect for valentines!  (Recipe makes an 8x8 pan) Ingredients: 10 tbsp (140g) unsalted butter, melted 1 cup (200g) granulated sugar ¼ cup (50g) brown sugar, packed  2 eggs, room temp 1 tsp vanilla extract ½ cup + 2 tbsp (56g) unsweetened cocoa powder ½ tsp salt 1 tbsp (13g) vegetable oil ½ cup (63g) all purpose flour, spooned & leveled or weighed (don’t pack it in) ¾ cup chocolate chips/ chunks 190g (~⅔ cup) Nutella  Topping: strawberry slices, patted dry (as many as you want/enough to cover the top) Nutella (to spread over the top and drizzle)  *if the nutella is too thick to drizzle you can melt it slightly in the microwave Instructions: Line an 8x8 pan with parchment paper. Spread the nutella onto the parchment into a thin, even square the size of the pan. Freeze for at least 20-30 minutes. Preheat oven to 325°F (163°C) and line/grease an 8x8-inch pan with parchment. In a large bowl, whisk melted butter, granulated sugar, and brown sugar until smooth. Add eggs and vanilla, then whisk vigorously for 1-2 minutes to help create a crackly top. Stir in cocoa powder and salt until fully combined. Mix in oil, then gently fold in the flour until just combined (don’t over mix). Fold in chocolate chips/chopped chocolate. Spread half the batter into the greased pan. Place the frozen nutella sheet on top of it. Then, spread the remaining batter over it to cover the nutella layer completely. Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until a toothpick near the center comes out with no wet batter. It should just come out with a little nutella & slightly moist crumbs. Let the brownies cool completely. Spread a thin layer of nutella over the cooled brownies, add the strawberry slices (patted dry) all over the top, and drizzle with more nutella.  Best enjoyed fresh!   #bakingrecipe #fudgybrownies #chocolatestrawberries #nutella #Recipe

Humans are the only species that has evolved far enough to treat and help other animals without receiving any direct benefit in return. This alone seems to suggest that humanity may indeed have a bright future. Of course, veterinary medicine is still largely an industrial field, closely tied to meat production. Yet over the past few decades, we have significantly reconsidered our relationship with animals in general - and with pets in particular. Just twenty years ago, it was unusual to see an owner taking their dog for a CT scan. Today, the health and well-being of animals truly matter to us. #medical #bio #veterinaria #veterinary #human

Ooey-Gooey Scoopable Nutella Cookie Pie🤤 Yields: 15-16 Chunky Cookies INGREDIENTS:  230g Cold Chopped Unsalted Butter  160g Caster Sugar  160g Light Brown Sugar  450g Chocolate Chunks or chips  475g Plain Flour  1 tsp Salt 3 tsp Baking Powder  3/4 tsp Baking Soda  2 Eggs  1 Egg Yolk  1 tsp Vanilla  INSTRUCTIONS: •Cut cling wrap into small squares. Scoop ½ teaspoon Nutella onto individual cling-wrap squares. Fold to seal and freeze until solid. (Repeat for however many Nutella stuffed cookies you plan to make.) •In a large mixing bowl, add the cold cubed butter and whisk until slightly creamy. Add the white sugar and light brown sugar, then whisk together until well combined and fluffy. •Add the eggs, vanilla extract, and chocolate chips or chunks. Whisk until fully incorporated. •Add the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. Gently mix until just combined, do not overmix. •Portion the dough into 90g balls. Press a frozen Nutella piece into the centre of each dough ball, seal well, and roll into a smooth ball. •Place the stuffed cookie dough balls onto a tray and freeze for at least 30 minutes (or overnight for best results). •Preheat oven to 180°C (350°F). •Take any shape baking dish circle, square, rectangle anything and line it with parchment paper. Arrange frozen cookie dough balls in it leaving some space between them. •Bake for 10-15 minutes (timing depends on the type of pan) or until the tops are lightly golden while the centres remain soft and gooey. •Remove from the oven and let cool slightly. •Serve warm with ice cream and chocolate sauce enjoy!✨ NOTE: Store any extra dough balls in an airtight container or freezer bag and freeze for later. Whenever a cookie craving hits, bake straight from frozen🫶🏻 #cookie #nutella #cookiepie #fyp #viral

Key Health Benefits of Pilates: Deep Core Strength: Pilates targets the deep abdominal muscles and pelvic floor, creating a strong "powerhouse" that supports the spine and protects the back. Improved Posture and Alignment: By strengthening neglected postural muscles and promoting better body awareness, it helps correct slouching and alignment issues. Increased Flexibility and Mobility: The exercises focus on lengthening muscles while strengthening them, which improves joint mobility and overall flexibility. Reduced Back Pain and Injury Prevention: It strengthens muscles around the spine and hips, helping to alleviate pain and lower the risk of injuries. Toned Muscles Without Bulk: Using eccentric contraction, Pilates develops long, lean muscle tone rather than building mass. Mental Well-being and Stress Relief: The focus on precise movement and breathing promotes relaxation, reduces cortisol levels, and enhances mental concentration. Accessible Low-Impact Exercise: Because it is low-impact, it is accessible to various fitness levels and provides a safe way to exercise #fyp #targetaudience #pilates #motivation #pilatesbyizzy

Pt.4 | My fall bakery menu 🍂 Recipe below 👇🏼  Crumbl released their Dubai Chocolate Brownie, but why buy it when you can make an even better one at home? 🤎✨ Ingredients 🟤Brownie Base * 180g caster sugar * 2 eggs * 113g unsalted butter (for browning) * 170g chopped chocolate * 80g plain flour * 3 tbsp cocoa powder * ½ tsp salt 💚Kunafa Filling * 260g kunafa pastry (finely chopped) * 2 tbsp unsalted butter (for toasting kunafa) * 320g pistachio cream 🍫Chocolate Ganache * 120g double cream * 100g milk chocolate (chopped) Instructions 1. Preheat the oven to 170°C and line a baking pan with parchment paper. 2. Brown 113g of unsalted butter in a saucepan until golden, then set aside. 3. Melt the chopped chocolate in the microwave in short bursts until smooth, then stir in the browned butter and let cool slightly. 4. In a separate bowl, whisk the sugar and eggs until light and fluffy. 5. Add the chocolate butter mixture to the eggs and sugar, and whisk until fully combined. 6. Fold in the flour, cocoa powder, and salt until just incorporated. 7. Pour all of the brownie batter into the prepared pan, smooth the top, and bake for 22 minutes. Let cool completely in the pan. 8. In a pan over medium heat, melt 2 tbsp of butter. Add the finely chopped kunafa pastry and cook, stirring often, until golden and crisp. Let cool slightly. 9. Mix the toasted kunafa pastry with the pistachio cream until fully combined, then spread evenly over the cooled brownie. 10. Place the pan in the fridge for about 30 minutes to set. 11. For the ganache, place the double cream and chopped milk chocolate in a microwave-safe bowl. Heat in short bursts, stirring in between, until melted and glossy. 12. Pour the ganache over the pistachio-kunafa layer, spread evenly, and refrigerate, ideally overnight, or at least 1 hour before slicing. Enjoy! 🤎 #baking #dubaichocolate #brownies #Recipe #fall

One of the BEST things I did during pregnancy was to create and film my new 21 day weight training program, Muscle Mami. Here I am 7 months pregnant and I have no pain, I’m sleeping deeply and I’m stronger than ever. We are about to move across the country and I feel capable, confident and calm. If you told me last year this is where I’d be and what I’d be doing, I would picture myself full of stress and truly just freaking tf out. But here I am, feeling like anything is possible. And I owe that to this program. I’m ready for all the chaos, the unexpected beauty and joy, the wild ride that has been the very best adventure of my life. I would love for you to join me! The challenge is open to all. It’s not just for pregnancy, but is of course pregnancy safe. I am doing it all over again with you all starting this Monday! Let’s do this 🦋💪

Changing your habits is hard. Being disciplined is hard. Healing your relationship with food is hard. Starting over is hard. But staying the same is hard too. Being unhappy in your body, Feeling uncomfortable in your own skin, Watching yourself stay stuck year after year.. That’s hard too. You don’t get to avoid hard you just get to choose which hard you’re willing to live with. eventually I realized the pain of changing was a lot less painful than the pain of staying miserable.

Skinfood khoai tây: AWY-XVJ-QPD 2. Skinfood cà rốt: BJV-ABC-CED 3. Numbuzin (centella): ABK-KQF-KPY 4. Beplain: ABV-FPW-VQJ 5. Abib: CLW-BWP-GJE 6. Dearklairs: AEQ-RTZ-SZA 7. Mediheal: CMB-JGT-AMR 8. Sungboon Editor: CHD-FPW-FFE 9. Ohui: hết hàng 10. CNP: ANS-WLE-PWD 11. Torriden: CDZ-ASX-UTN 12. Medicube xanh dương (zero pore pad mild): BXL-KVU-PHA 13. Medicube xanh lá (super cica pad):  họ đổi sang mẫu exosome cica BVB-EBN-CXD 14. Medicube nâu (deep vit C): BTF-GPP-HAJ 15. Medicube xanh lá (exosome cica calming): BVB-EBN-CXD 16. Numbuzin (vitamin niacinamide đậm đặc): CBP-CCC-LBY 17. Biodance: AJL-RXD-YFX 18. Nadeshiko: CCR-UQT-XZM 19. Emmie màu hồng: CCE-NYB-LLX 20. Emmie màu xanh dương: BUQ-GVC-HPH 21. Full Body Dumbbell Workout  Highly requested 🤍 so here’s a dumbbell version of the full body plate workout I posted recently that you guys tried and loved. Simple, effective, and it burns 🔥 We’re using 15 lb dumbbells, but choose a weight that challenges you while still letting you keep good form. Workout: • Alternating Single-Arm DB Squat x10 • Double DB Ground-to-Overhead x10 • Halo Squat x10 • Alternating Knee Drive Squat x10 Complete 3 rounds 🔥 Save it & give it a try 💪🏼 #nogymnoproblem #homeworkout #fullbodyworkout #workoutathome #dumbbellworkout

Strawberry phyllo pie 🍓 5 sheets phyllo dough 25 g butter Filling: 300 g cream cheese 2 egg yolks 5 tbsp powdered sugar 2 tbsp cornstarch 300 g strawberries 30 g almond flakes Brush each phyllo sheet with melted butter and place into the baking dish. Mix cream cheese with egg yolks, powdered sugar and cornstarch. Add the cream and strawberries onto the dough, fold the edges, brush with butter and sprinkle with almond flakes. Bake at 170°C top-bottom heat for 35 minutes. Pastel de masa filo con fresas 🍓 5 hojas de masa filo 25 g mantequilla Relleno: 300 g queso crema 2 yemas 5 cdas azúcar glas 2 cdas maicena 300 g fresas 30 g láminas de almendra Pincelar cada hoja de masa filo con mantequilla derretida y colocar en el molde. Mezclar el queso crema con las yemas, azúcar glas y maicena. Colocar la crema y las fresas sobre la masa, cerrar los bordes, pincelar con mantequilla y espolvorear almendra. Hornear a 170°C calor arriba y abajo durante 35 minutos. #phyllodough #strawberrydessert #EasyRecipe #homemadedessert #foodreels
